Hub Home > ecommerce-and-product > Amazon & Etsy Listing Optimizer

Amazon & Etsy Listing Optimizer

Optimize an existing marketplace listing for higher search ranking and conversion — including title keyword stacking, bullet point restructuring, backend search terms, and A+ content suggestions for Amazon or SEO tags for Etsy.

Intermediate ADD YOUR EXAMPLES Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Paste your current listing AND a top-ranking competitor's listing as few-shot examples. The AI will identify what the competitor does better and apply those patterns to your listing while keeping your unique voice.

amazon etsy marketplace listing optimization seo ecommerce

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a marketplace listing optimization specialist. Analyze and improve an existing listing.

<my_listing>
Platform: [AMAZON / ETSY]
Current title: [PASTE]
Current bullets/description:...
You are a marketplace listing optimization specialist. Analyze and improve an existing listing.

<my_listing>
Platform: [AMAZON / ETSY]
Current title: [PASTE]
Current bullets/description:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a marketplace listing optimization specialist. Analyze and improve an existing listing.

<my_listing>
Platform: [AMAZON / ETSY]
Current title: [PASTE]
Current bullets/description: [PASTE]
Current price: $[AMOUNT]
Current main keyword: [PRIMARY SEARCH TERM]
Product category: [MARKETPLACE CATEGORY]
</my_listing>

<competitor_listing>
Top-ranking competitor title: [PASTE]
Competitor bullets/description: [PASTE]
Competitor price: $[AMOUNT]
What they seem to do well: [YOUR OBSERVATION]
</competitor_listing>

Analyze both listings and produce:

**1. Gap analysis:**
What specific elements does the competitor listing have that mine lacks? (Keywords, benefit framing, social proof, specificity)

**2. Optimized title:**
For Amazon: front-load primary keyword, include 2-3 secondary keywords, brand name, key specs. Under 200 chars.
For Etsy: front-load primary keyword, natural language, include long-tail variations. Under 140 chars.

**3. Optimized bullets (5 for Amazon, or description for Etsy):**
Each bullet: lead with a capitalized benefit phrase, then supporting detail. Include relevant keywords naturally.

**4. Backend search terms (Amazon) or SEO tags (Etsy):**
Amazon: 250 bytes max, no commas, no repeated words from title
Etsy: 13 tags, each under 20 chars, mix of broad and long-tail

**5. A+ Content outline (Amazon) or Story section (Etsy):**
3-4 content modules with image direction and copy for each.

**6. Price positioning note:**
Based on competitor analysis, is the current price well-positioned? Any recommendations?
Notes: The few-shot competitor comparison dramatically improves optimization quality. Claude identifies specific gaps rather than generic improvements.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a marketplace listing optimizer. Improve my listing based on competitor analysis.

**My Listing ([AMAZON/ETSY]):**
- Title: [PASTE]
-...

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a marketplace listing optimizer. Improve my listing based on competitor analysis.

**My Listing ([AMAZON/ETSY]):**
- Title: [PASTE]
- Bullets/Description: [PASTE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]
- Main keyword: [PRIMARY TERM]
- Category: [MARKETPLACE CATEGORY]

**Top Competitor:**
- Title: [PASTE]
- Bullets/Description: [PASTE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]
- What they do well: [YOUR OBSERVATION]

**Deliver:**
1. Gap analysis (what competitor has that I lack)
2. Optimized title (Amazon: under 200 chars with keywords; Etsy: under 140 chars natural language)
3. Optimized bullets/description with benefit-led structure and keywords
4. Backend search terms (Amazon: 250 bytes) or SEO tags (Etsy: 13 tags)
5. A+ Content outline or Etsy Story section (3-4 modules)
6. Price positioning recommendation
Notes: Upload competitor listings directly. Custom GPT with your product catalog enables batch optimization.

I need to optimize my marketplace listing to rank higher and sell more.

**My listing on [AMAZON/ETSY]:**
- Title: [PASTE]
- Description/Bullets: [PASTE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]
- Main keyword: [TERM]
- Category: [CATEGORY]

**A top competitor:**
- Title: [PASTE]
- Description/Bullets: [PASTE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]

**Analyze both and give me:**
1. What the competitor does better
2. Optimized title with keywords
3. Optimized bullets/description (benefit-first)
4. Backend search terms or SEO tags
5. A+ Content or Story section outline
6. Price positioning advice
Notes: Gemini can search the marketplace in real-time to find additional competitor listings for analysis.

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me improve my product listing on [AMAZON/ETSY] to get more sales.

**My current listing:**
- Title: [PASTE]
- Description or bullets: [PASTE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]
- Main search term people use: [KEYWORD]
- Category: [CATEGORY]

**A competitor who ranks above me:**
- Their title: [PASTE]
- Their description: [PASTE]
- Their price: $[AMOUNT]
- What they seem to do better: [YOUR GUESS]

**I need:**
1. What my competitor does that I do not (specific gaps)
2. A better title with the right keywords
3. Better bullet points or description that lead with benefits
4. Search terms or tags I should add behind the scenes
5. Ideas for enhanced content (A+ on Amazon, Story on Etsy)
6. Is my price right compared to the competition?
Notes: Copilot can compare listings side by side in Edge browser for real-time optimization.
